languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

languages.text: "Магос Ханейманн, твой конфликт с соратниками из Культа Механикус будоражит мое любопытство. Какой догмат ты нарушил, чтобы спровоцировать нападение? Знаешь ли ты сам? Мы с Нунциусом могли бы помочь с изучением аугментов павших..."

"Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"
languages.original_text: "Магос Ханейманн, твой конфликт с соратниками из Культа Механикус будоражит мое любопытство. Какой догмат ты нарушил, чтобы спровоцировать нападение? Знаешь ли ты сам? Мы с Нунциусом могли бы помочь с изучением аугментов павших..."

traits.locale_text: "Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

"Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

"Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

languages.text: «Magos Haneumann, su conflicto con otros miembros del Culto Mechanicus ha despertado mi curiosidad. ¿Qué dogma ha violado para provocar este ataque? ¿Lo sabe, acaso? Nuncius y yo podríamos ayudarle a examinar los aumentos de los caídos...».
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

traits.locale_text: «Magos Haneumann, su conflicto con otros miembros del Culto Mechanicus ha despertado mi curiosidad. ¿Qué dogma ha violado para provocar este ataque? ¿Lo sabe, acaso? Nuncius y yo podríamos ayudarle a examinar los aumentos de los caídos...».

languages.text: 「マゴス・ハネウマン、あなたと機械教の同胞たちとの対立が、私の好奇心をそそります。そのような攻撃を招くとは、あなたはどの教義を犯したのですか？ そもそもご存じなのですか？ ヌンキウスと私であれば、倒れた者たちのオーグメティックの検分をお手伝いできます――」
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

traits.locale_text: 「マゴス・ハネウマン、あなたと機械教の同胞たちとの対立が、私の好奇心をそそります。そのような攻撃を招くとは、あなたはどの教義を犯したのですか？ そもそもご存じなのですか？ ヌンキウスと私であれば、倒れた者たちのオーグメティックの検分をお手伝いできます――」

languages.text: “哈努曼贤者，你与机械修会同僚之间的冲突引起了我的好奇。你违反了哪条教义，竟招致如此攻击？你清楚原因吗？我与努恩修斯可以协助检查死者的植入物——”
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

traits.locale_text: “哈努曼贤者，你与机械修会同僚之间的冲突引起了我的好奇。你违反了哪条教义，竟招致如此攻击？你清楚原因吗？我与努恩修斯可以协助检查死者的植入物——”

languages.text: "Magos Haneumann, Euer Konflikt mit anderen Mitgliedern des Kult Mechanicus hat mein Interesse geweckt. Welches Dogma habt Ihr verletzt, um einen derartigen Angriff zu provozieren? Wisst Ihr es überhaupt? Nuncius und ich könnten Euch bei der Untersuchung der Augmentationen der gefallenen ..."
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

traits.locale_text: "Magos Haneumann, Euer Konflikt mit anderen Mitgliedern des Kult Mechanicus hat mein Interesse geweckt. Welches Dogma habt Ihr verletzt, um einen derartigen Angriff zu provozieren? Wisst Ihr es überhaupt? Nuncius und ich könnten Euch bei der Untersuchung der Augmentationen der gefallenen ..."

languages.text: « Magos Haneumann, votre conflit avec les autres membres du Culte Mechanicus a piqué ma curiosité. Quel dogme avez-vous enfreint pour provoquer une telle attaque ? Le savez-vous seulement ? Nuncius et moi pourrions vous aider en examinant les augmentations du... »
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"

traits.locale_text: « Magos Haneumann, votre conflit avec les autres membres du Culte Mechanicus a piqué ma curiosité. Quel dogme avez-vous enfreint pour provoquer une telle attaque ? Le savez-vous seulement ? Nuncius et moi pourrions vous aider en examinant les augmentations du... »

languages.text: "Magos Haneumann, Cult Mechanicus'un diğer mensuplarıyla olan çatışmanız merakımı cezbetti. Böyle bir saldırıyı kışkırtmak için hangi dogmayı ihlal ettiniz? Biliyor musunuz bari? Nuncius ve ben düşenlerin ogmentlerini incelemede yardımcı olabiliriz..."
languages.original_text: "Magos Haneumann, your conflict with fellow members of the Cult Mechanicus has piqued my curiosity. What dogma have you violated to provoke such an attack? Do you even know? Nuncius and I could assist with examining the augments of the fallen—"
